inputs.label: US Jacket Size
inputs.businessContext: Enter the US men's suit jacket size (chest measurement in inches). Standard sizes: 36, 38, 40, 42, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the US men's suit jacket size (chest measurement in inches). Standard sizes: 36, 38, 40, 42, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ABD erkek takım elbise ceket bedenini (göğüs ölçüsü inç cinsinden) girin. Standart bedenler: 36, 38, 40, 42 vb.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie die US-Herren-Anzugjackengröße (Brustumfang in Zoll) ein. Standardgrößen: 36, 38, 40, 42 usw.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez la taille de veste de costume homme US (tour de poitrine en pouces). Tailles standard : 36, 38, 40, 42, etc.

inputs.label: US Pants Waist (inches)
inputs.businessContext: Optional: Enter the US pants waist size in inches for conversion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional: Enter the US pants waist size in inches for conversion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: Dönüşüm için ABD pantolon bel ölçüsünü inç cinsinden girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optional: Geben Sie die US-Hosenbundweite in Zoll zur Umrechnung ein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Optionnel : Entrez le tour de taille du pantalon US en pouces pour la conversion.

inputs.label: US Pants Inseam (inches)
inputs.businessContext: Optional: Enter the US pants inseam length in inches.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional: Enter the US pants inseam length in inches.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: ABD pantolon iç dikiş uzunluğunu inç cinsinden girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optional: Geben Sie die US-Hoseninnenbeinlänge in Zoll ein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Optionnel : Entrez la longueur d'entrejambe du pantalon US en pouces.

inputs.label: Jacket Size Offset
inputs.businessContext: The conversion offset from US to EU jacket size (EU = US + offset). Standard is 10. Adjust if needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: The conversion offset from US to EU jacket size (EU = US + offset). Standard is 10. Adjust if needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ABD'den AB ceket bedenine dönüşüm farkı (AB = ABD + fark). Standart 10'dur. Gerekirse ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Umrechnungs-Offset von US- zu EU-Jackengröße (EU = US + Offset). Standard ist 10. Bei Bedarf anpassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le décalage de conversion de la taille de veste US vers EU (EU = US + décalage). Standard est 10. Ajustez si nécessaire.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
